name: imbalanced-losses
summary: imbalanced-losses is a PyTorch library of training losses for class-imbalanced classification and ranking-metric optimization — Focal Loss, plus differentiable surrogates for Average Precision (Smooth-AP), Recall-at-Quantile, and Partial-AUC-at-Budget — with built-in DDP all-gather support for globally-correct estimation across multi-GPU training.
